components.name: Breadcrumb
components.purpose: Show the active path from academic year to lesson workspace.

components.name: Teaching Ribbon
components.purpose: Expose teacher workflow commands: Home, Teach, Resources, Assess, Review, Improve and Publish.

components.name: Workspace Tabs
components.purpose: Provide consistent tabs such as Overview, Resources, Assessment, Evidence, Reflection, History and AI.

components.name: Curriculum Tree
components.purpose: Browse Year Group → Scheme → Unit → Lesson without leaving the Curriculum Intelligence Centre.

components.name: Readiness Indicator
components.purpose: Calculate whether a lesson is ready to teach based on required planning, resource, assessment and reflection components.

components.name: Metric Card
components.purpose: Display a key system metric with context and status.

components.name: Timeline
components.purpose: Show lesson sequence, unit journey, teaching history and release activity.

components.name: AI Panel
components.purpose: Provide context-aware support using lesson, unit, resources, reflection and assessment summaries.

components.name: Reflection Card
components.purpose: Capture structured reflection and improvement actions after delivery.

components.name: Build Validator
components.purpose: Validate release readiness across architecture, data, documentation and testing.
